title: Pericles
content:
Well and wisely said the Greek,
    Be thou faithful, but not fond;
    To the altar's foot thy fellow seek,--
    The Furies wait beyond.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Pericles"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
